message:
fix(providers): OpenAI Responses API stream lifecycle + conversation scroll fix

- src/providers/openai_responses.rs: add TextStart/TextEnd event
  emission for proper text block lifecycle tracking in the Responses
  API streaming path (mirrors the fix already applied to the Chat
  Completions path)
- src/interactive/conversation.rs: improve scroll-to-bottom detection
  and auto-scroll behavior during streaming updates
- tests/cross_platform_reports/linux/: refreshed platform test reports
- tests/full_suite_gate/artifact_retention_report.json: updated metrics

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
